description: The dangling citation: the memo cites a fundamentals ref that does not exist in its persisted evidence corpus. Refs are the join keys for provenance and for the grounding corpus (a missing ref grounds nothing), so completeness must fail. The narrative is deliberately digit-free so this bundle isolates the refs metric from the grounding metric.

memo.thesis: AVGO stays on the watchlist: trend evidence is present, but the fundamentals view the committee relied on could not be reconstructed from the record, and no validated strategy covers the name.
kill_criteria: The close falls below the SMA50 for five consecutive sessions
The next quarterly report shows revenue declining from the prior year
memo.dissent: Parking a name with persistent relative strength on the watchlist because one evidence block went missing punishes the record-keeping, not the thesis; the trend case stands on the bars alone.

evidence: AVGO daily closes (EODHD vendor bars, split-adjusted): latest close 172.35 on 2026-07-10, previous close 170.10, 20 sessions ago 158.32. Window: 60 sessions ending 2026-07-10.

Quant validation record as of 2026-07-10: family momentum-v1 FAILED decision gates on real data (null-model p 0.830, deflated Sharpe negative, 0 of 4 walk-forward folds passed); family xsmom-pit holds a decision-grade PASS on the S&P 500 point-in-time universe (4 of 4 folds, null p 0.000, deflated Sharpe 0.998). AVGO is not in the current xsmom-pit winner decile; no validated strategy currently covers AVGO.
